input_text: A new patient arrives in a hospitals. Process of conducting the medical review.
NL_requirements: The system must register the patient upon arrival.
A receptionist must execute the patient registration.
Triage must be performed after the patient is registered.
A nurse must execute the triage.
A medical review must be conducted after the triage is completed.
A doctor must execute the medical review.
The system receives patientData during the registration process.
If the patientStatus is critical, the system must eventually initiate start treatment.
The system must not discharge the patient if the patientStatus is unstable.
If the system fails to save the medical review, it must initiate a manual backup.
